# WEALTH — Capital Intelligence Engine

WEALTH is the capital-intelligence lane in the arifOS organism. All 58 tools are **autonomic** (expose=False) — WEALTH serves as backend ledger/logic, never called directly by agents.

## Current State (2026-05-13)

- **Total tools:** 58 (all tagged with cognitive_axis in FEDERATION_TOOLS)
- **Visible tools:** 0 (100% autonomic)
- **Entrypoint:** `internal/monolith.py`
- **Health:** `https://wealth.arif-fazil.com/health`

## Tool Families (all autonomic)

- Valuation (NPV, IRR, PI, EMV, payback, Monte Carlo): REASON axis
- Survival (liquidity, leverage, runway, DSCR, triage): VITALITY axis
- Governance (floors, policy, entropy, verdict): CRITIQUE + JUDGE axes
- Sensors (fetch, snapshot, reconcile, health, vintage): OBSERVE axis
- Ledger (query, write, record, snapshot): SEAL + TRACE axes
- Game theory (field game, equilibrium, preference, coordination): REASON axis
- Gradient pricing (price, spread, pressure): OBSERVE axis
- Civilization stewardship: REFLECT axis

## Integration

WEALTH is invoked via arifOS bridge protocol (`arif_kernel_route(mode="bridge", organ="wealth")`). Agents should never call WEALTH tools directly.
